zh.Kasteel Grave, Grave, North Brabant, The: 荷蘭努-布拉班特格拉福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Heer Jan Van Wijtfliet van Blaasveld en Cuijk於1312年出生在荷蘭時，他的父親Jean I I Le Pacifique De Vreedzame DE BRABANT37歲，母親Dame Elsbeen van Wijtvliet22歲。他於大約1335年與Maria Pipenpoy van Blaersvelt結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1356年8月17日在荷蘭努-布拉班特格拉福享年44歲。

zh-hans.Kasteel Grave, Grave, North Brabant, The: 荷兰努-布拉班特格拉福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heer Jan Van Wijtfliet van Blaasveld en Cuijk于1312年出生在荷兰时，他的父亲Jean I I Le Pacifique De Vreedzame DE BRABANT37岁，母亲Dame Elsbeen van Wijtvliet22岁。他于大约1335年与Maria Pipenpoy van Blaersvelt结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1356年8月17日在荷兰努-布拉班特格拉福享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Heer Jan Van Wijtfliet van Blaasveld en Cuijk was born in 1312, in Netherlands, his father, Jean I I Le Pacifique De Vreedzame DE BRABANT, was 37 and his mother, Dame Elsbeen van Wijtvliet, was 22. He married Maria Pipenpoy van Blaersvelt about 1335. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 17 August 1356, in Grave, North Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heer Jan Van Wijtfliet van Blaasveld en Cuijk est né en 1312, à Pays-Bas, son père, Jean I I Le Pacifique De Vreedzame DE BRABANT, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Dame Elsbeen van Wijtvliet, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Maria Pipenpoy van Blaersvelt environ 1335. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 17 août 1356, à Grave, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heer Jan Van Wijtfliet van Blaasveld en Cuijk 1312 in Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean I I Le Pacifique De Vreedzame DE BRABANT 37 und seine Mutter Dame Elsbeen van Wijtvliet 22. Er hat um 1335 Maria Pipenpoy van Blaersvelt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 17. August 1356 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Grave, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heer Jan Van Wijtfliet van Blaasveld en Cuijk è nato il nel 1312 nel Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Jean I I Le Pacifique De Vreedzame DE BRABANT, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Dame Elsbeen van Wijtvliet, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Maria Pipenpoy van Blaersvelt circa 1335. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 17 agosto 1356, nel Grave, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.Tervuren, Duchy of Brabant, Holy Roman E: ベルギーブラバントテルvウレン
ja.lifeSummary: Heer Jan Van Wijtfliet van Blaasveld en Cuijkが1312年にオランダで生まれた時，父Jean I I Le Pacifique De Vreedzame DE BRABANTは37歳，母Dame Elsbeen van Wijtvlietは22歳であった。約1335年にMaria Pipenpoy van Blaersveltと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1356年8月17日にオランダノオルド-ブラバントグラブで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heer Jan Van Wijtfliet van Blaasveld en Cuijk(이)가 1312년 네덜란드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean I I Le Pacifique De Vreedzame DE BRABANT(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Elsbeen van Wijtvliet(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1335년 Maria Pipenpoy van Blaersvelt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1356년 8월 17일 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 그레이브에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Kasteel Grave, Grave, North Brabant, The: Grave, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heer Jan Van Wijtfliet van Blaasveld en Cuijk nasceu em 1312, em Países Baixos, seu pai, Jean I I Le Pacifique De Vreedzame DE BRABANT, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Dame Elsbeen van Wijtvliet, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Pipenpoy van Blaersvelt aproximadamente 1335. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 17 de agosto de 1356, em Grave, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heer Jan Van Wijtfliet van Blaasveld en Cuijk родился в 1312 г. в местности Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Jean I I Le Pacifique De Vreedzame DE BRABANT было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Elsbeen van Wijtvliet, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Pipenpoy van Blaersvelt около 1335 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 17 августа 1356 г. в местности грав, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heer Jan Van Wijtfliet van Blaasveld en Cuijk nació en 1312, en Países Bajos, su papá, Jean I I Le Pacifique De Vreedzame DE BRABANT, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Dame Elsbeen van Wijtvliet, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Maria Pipenpoy van Blaersvelt aproximadamente 1335. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 17 de agosto de 1356, en Grave, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, a la edad de 44 años.
